name: leadbay
description: AI lead discovery, qualification, and outreach prep on your Leadbay account.

leadbay_token.title: Leadbay bearer token
leadbay_token.description: Bearer token, set by the installer. Run: npx -y -p @leadbay/mcp@latest installer

leadbay_region.title: Region
leadbay_region.description: Leadbay backend for your account: us or fr.

leadbay_mcp_write.title: Enable composite write tools
leadbay_mcp_write.description: Expose composite write tools such as refine_prompt, adjust_audience, report_outreach, bulk_qualify_leads, enrich_titles, answer_clarification, and import_leads.
